lines.english: Why was the writer's aunt surprised?
lines.chinese: 作家的阿姨为什么感到惊讶？
lines.raw: Why was the writer's aunt surprised? | 作家的阿姨为什么感到惊讶？
It was Sunday. | 那是星期天。

lines.english: I never get up early on Sundays.
lines.raw: I never get up early on Sundays. | 我星期天从不起早。

lines.english: I sometimes stay in bed until lunchtime.
lines.chinese: 我有时会一直睡到午饭时间。
lines.raw: I sometimes stay in bed until lunchtime. | 我有时会一直睡到午饭时间。

lines.english: Last Sunday I got up very late.
lines.chinese: 上个星期天我起得很晚。
lines.raw: Last Sunday I got up very late. | 上个星期天我起得很晚。

lines.english: I looked out of the window.
lines.raw: I looked out of the window. | 我向窗外望去。
It was dark outside. | 外面天很黑。
'What a day!' I thought. | “这是什么天气啊！”我想。
Just then, the telephone rang. | 就在那时，电话响了。
It was my aunt Lucy. | 是我的露西姨妈。

lines.english: 'I've just arrived by train,' she said.
lines.raw: 'I've just arrived by train,' she said. | 她说：“我刚乘火车到了。”
'I'm coming to see you.' | “我要来看你。”

lines.english: 'But I'm still having breakfast,' I said.
lines.raw: 'But I'm still having breakfast,' I said. | “可是我还在吃早饭呢。”我说。
'What are you doing?' she asked. | 她问：“你在做什么？”
'I'm having breakfast,' I repeated. | “我在吃早饭。”我重复道。

lines.english: 'Do you always get up so late?
lines.raw: 'Do you always get up so late? | “你总是起这么晚吗？
It's one o'clock!' | 已经一点钟了！”
